svg.title: VIBE Platform — Advanced Architecture Flow Diagram
svg.desc: Full-stack architecture of VIBE platform showing client layer, AI orchestration, backend services, data layer, infrastructure, and deployment pipeline with all interconnections.
svg.text: Visual edit → AST diff → code patch | Code edit → component tree parse → canvas re-render | Conflict resolution via CRDT

g.text: Topics: code.generated · project.saved · deploy.triggered · collab.delta · billing.event

svg.text: Primary (us-east) → replicated to EU + APAC | Active-active with geo-aware routing | 99.99% SLA target
